settings.title: Combi Transport
settings.description: Hop in our iconic combi van. We handle all the driving so you can enjoy the ride through CDMX.

settings.title: 8 Tacos, 4 Stops
settings.description: Two expertly chosen tacos at each of four legendary taquerias. From al pastor to regional specialties.

settings.title: Expert Guide
settings.description: Led by Christopher Chaput, El Perrito Taquero. History, stories, and insider knowledge at every stop.

settings.title: Bebidas Included
settings.description: Refreshing drinks at each stop. Agua fresca, horchata, or a cold cerveza to wash it all down.

settings.title: Curated Route
settings.description: We've mapped out the perfect taco crawl. No tourist traps, only the spots locals swear by.

settings.title: Photo Moments
settings.description: Instagram-worthy stops and taco shots. Leave with memories and content for your feed.

settings.text: I thought I knew tacos until Christopher took us to spots I never would have found. The al pastor at the second stop literally changed my life. Worth every peso.
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.text: This isn't just a food tour, it's a cultural experience. Christopher knows the history behind every taqueria and every taco. My friends and I haven't stopped talking about it.
settings.name: David K.

settings.text: The combi ride alone is worth it. Add in 8 incredible tacos, great company, and Christopher's energy — this is the must-do activity in CDMX.
settings.name: Ana L.

settings.question: What's included in the tour?
settings.answer: Everything! Transport in our combi van, 8 tacos across 4 taquerias (2 per stop), drinks at each location, and your guide Christopher sharing the history and culture behind each taco.

settings.question: How long does the tour last?
settings.answer: The tour runs approximately 3 to 4 hours. We take our time at each stop so you can enjoy the food, the atmosphere, and the stories.

settings.question: Can I join if I have dietary restrictions?
settings.answer: We do our best to accommodate allergies and dietary needs. Please let us know when booking, and we'll coordinate with the taquerias. Note: our tours are focused on traditional Mexican street food and options may be limited for strict dietary requirements.

settings.question: What's the cancellation policy?
settings.answer: Full refund if you cancel 48 hours or more before the tour. Cancellations within 48 hours are non-refundable, but you can reschedule once for free.

settings.question: Is the tour in English or Spanish?
settings.answer: Tours are conducted in English with plenty of Spanish sprinkled in for the authentic experience. Christopher is fluent in both.

settings.question: Where do we meet?
settings.answer: You'll receive a meeting point in the confirmation email, typically a central location that's easy to reach by metro or taxi. The combi picks you up from there.

settings.question: Is the food safe to eat?
settings.answer: All taquerias on our route are carefully selected for both quality and hygiene. Christopher personally vets every stop. That said, if you have a sensitive stomach, we recommend coming prepared just in case.
